title: knautia bosniaca
intro: Knautia bosniaca, also known as Serbian knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Caprifoliaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which help in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. Knautia bosniaca can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
